assertions.evidence: Output lists both 'Email notifications' and 'SMS notifications' as In-Scope items with source text '支持邮件' and '支持短信'
Output lists 'Push notifications' in the Out-of-Scope table with source text '不包括推送通知' and reason 'Explicitly excluded by user'
Output uses '### In-Scope' and '### Out-of-Scope' heading structure and generates a complete Scope section for proposal.md
